fileName: MCLN Mid Atlantic DC Wawa Selection Label Design Overview.docx
webUrl: MCLN Mid Atlantic DC Wawa Selection Label Design Overview.docx
title: MCLN Mid Atlantic DC Wawa Selection Label Design Overview
fullText: Mid Atlantic DC Wawa Selection Label Design Overview Configurations to add two-character code to full case shipping label: There is a special request from WAWA to identify certain items with a two-character code on the shipping label. This would assist McLane drivers at the time of delivery to locate WAWA items at a certain location in the stores. We have identified “Reference Numerical Field 5” in the Items UI to store this code. Mark Magic will access this code from the Items UI and add it to the label template during the time of picking and printing. 5557736 2216461 What is this field? What is this field? 3514703 2034896 3514703 2034896 2878583 1774976 2878583 1774976 Current Label: Future Label: Assumptions: McLane will be responsible for storing and maintaining these values, and base Manhattan WMOS functionality will be used to store the data. Codes will be held in ITEM_CBO.REF_NUM5, or at the UI in Items-> ReferenceFld -> Reference numeric field 5. A corresponding two - character value will be held in the System Code UI that will allow this code to be translated from a numeric value into an alphanumeric value. The division will be responsible for maintaining these values by making changes directly within the Items UI . DCNF will be responsible to add additional product placement areas in System Codes at the request of the division. This change to the items UI field is not at the customer level but at the item level. Any other customers purchasing this item will also have these two-char code printed on the shipping label. Configuration s teps to add in System Codes: Create new system code W01. Fill it with the below information and save. Next add code ID’s. The below code codes were provided by the division. This custom code is tied to Item Ref num field #5 . Division will update items as needed by following the below steps: Search for items in Items UI . Select the item and click Edi t. Scroll all the way to the bottom and fill in the numerical value that corresponds to the product placement area code and save the changes. Do not fill in the two-character code, just the numerical value.

chunks.text:
[Document: MCLN Mid Atlantic DC Wawa Selection Label Design Overview]

Mid Atlantic DC Wawa Selection Label Design Overview Configurations to add two-character code to full case shipping label: There is a special request from WAWA to identify certain items with a two-character code on the shipping label. This would assist McLane drivers at the time of delivery to locate WAWA items at a certain location in the stores. We have identified “Reference Numerical Field 5” in the Items UI to store this code. Mark Magic will access this code from the Items UI and add it to the label template during the time of picking and printing. 5557736 2216461 What is this field? What is this field? 3514703 2034896 3514703 2034896 2878583 1774976 2878583 1774976 Current Label: Future Label: Assumptions: McLane will be responsible for storing and maintaining these values, and base Manhattan WMOS functionality will be used to store the data. Codes will be held in ITEM_CBO.REF_NUM5, or at the UI in Items-> ReferenceFld -> Reference numeric field 5. A corresponding two - character value will be held in the System Code UI that will allow this code to be translated from a numeric value into an alphanumeric value. The division will be responsible for maintaining these values by making changes directly within the Items UI . DCNF will be responsible to add additional product placement areas in System Codes at the request of the division. This change to the items UI field is not at the customer level but at the item level. Any other customers purchasing this item will also have these two-char code printed on the shipping label. Configuration s teps to add in System Codes: Create new system code W01. Fill it with the below information and save. Next add code ID’s. The below code codes were provided by the division. This custom code is tied to Item Ref num field #5 . Division will update items as needed by following the below steps: Search for items in Items UI . Select the item and click Edi t. Scroll all the way to the bottom and fill in the numerical value that corresponds to the product placement area code and save the changes. Do not fill in the two-character code, just the numerical value.
